keysNeverLeaveDevice: Your private keys never leave your device
crashInstructions: Check console for CRASH REPORT. Refresh to restart.
welcomeDescription: Add a friend to start chatting. Your messages are end-to-end encrypted and delivered peer-to-peer.
helpStartConversation: To start a conversation, go to the Friends page and add someone by their DID.
helpFriendConversation: Once you're friends, a conversation is created automatically. Messages are end-to-end encrypted — only you and the recipient can read them.
helpNavFriends: Navigate to Friends from the sidebar
helpPasteDid: Paste a DID to send a friend request
helpAcceptedConvo: Once accepted, your conversation appears here
noFriendsYet: No friends yet. Add friends first!
selectMinFriend: Select at least 1 friend to invite.
failedCreateGroup: Failed to create group. Please try again.
chooseConversationForward: Choose a conversation to forward to.
printableRecoveryDesc: Generate a black-and-white PDF with your account details and QR code. Print it and store it somewhere safe.
pdfPreviewWebOnly: PDF preview is available on web only.
recoveryPhraseWarning: Anyone with this document can access your account!
recoveryPhraseNote: Your 24-word phrase will be printed on the document
recoveryDocSensitive: This document contains sensitive recovery data. Store it securely.
recoveryDocPublic: This document contains your public DID and QR code only.
updateReadyDesc: Umbra v{{version}} has been downloaded and is ready to install. The app will restart to apply the update.
searchCommandPlaceholder: Search users, messages, or type a command...
channelNameMaxLength: Channel name must be 100 characters or less.
joinCommunityDesc: Enter an invite code or paste an invite link to join an existing community.
invalidInviteCode: Please enter a valid invite code or link.
failedJoinCommunity: Failed to join community. The invite may be invalid.
alreadyMember: You're already a member of this community.
inviteNotFound: This invite couldn't be found. Check the code and try again, or ask the community owner to send you an invite from within the app.
inviteMaxUses: This invite has reached its maximum number of uses.
bannedFromCommunity: You are banned from this community.
communityFoundButFailed: Found "{{name}}" ({{count}} members) but couldn't join. The community owner may need to share an updated invite.
communityFoundRetryFailed: Found "{{name}}" but couldn't complete the join. Please try again.
noSharedFoldersDesc: Create a shared folder from a DM conversation to start sharing files with friends.
noFilesInFolder: No files in this folder yet
noFilesDesc: Drag and drop files here or click Upload above.
